markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review client project status and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Reddit & Enable:** Both clients require the agentic pipeline due to high technical expectations. Marcel will demonstrate copying the existing pipeline to accelerate setup and enable immediate testing.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [**Field Guide:** The client's Head of CS provided key positioning feedback, shifting focus away from being a "Mac-only" solution to broaden their market appeal.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Rimkus:** A publishing delay, caused by a 1Password access issue, prompted a client complaint. This highlights the need to automate publishing for clients on manual CMS platforms like WordPress.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**Hyper-Exponential:** Progress is unblocked. The client's contact (Frankie) returns from vacation tomorrow to review drafts, and we now have access to Framer for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)

## Topics

### Process & Pipeline Improvements

  - [**Agentic Pipeline:** Marcel will demonstrate copying the agentic pipeline to accelerate setup for new technical clients (Reddit, Enable).](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This enables immediate testing and refinement without waiting for engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [**Caution:** The pipeline must be customized for each industry, as a generic version can perform worse than the standard pipeline (per Stevie).](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [**Publishing Automation:** A Rimkus publishing delay caused by a 1Password access issue prompted a client complaint.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [**Problem:** Manual CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress) are prone to delays and errors.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**Solution:** Generate tickets to automate publishing for clients not on platforms like Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNTsjZEFn_xhE-iqDZyGzMy6fxCZox93?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
